sources.exact_document_title: Practice Advisory for Intraoperative Awareness and Brain Function Monitoring
sources.population: Patients receiving general anesthesia, with risk-factor and reported-awareness qualifiers.
sources.clinical_setting: Preoperative risk assessment and post-event interview, documentation, and support after a report of intraoperative awareness.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documenting previous awareness, focused record and interview review, selected risk discussion, post-event structured interview, occurrence reporting, and offered counseling or support. It is old, is not a guideline or standard, and does not establish that awareness occurred.

exact_sections.heading: Preoperative evaluation and Appendix 1 summary
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports review of records, interview about previous anesthesia experiences including prior awareness, focused risk assessment, and informing selected higher-risk patients without predicting awareness.

exact_sections.heading: Postoperative interventions and Appendix 1 summary
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports a structured interview after a reported event, documenting the account, offering counseling or psychological support, and completing an occurrence report without confirming causation.

archive.title: Practice Advisory for Intraoperative Awareness and Brain Function Monitoring
archive.population: Patients receiving general anesthesia, with risk-factor and reported-awareness qualifiers.
archive.setting: Preoperative risk assessment and post-event interview, documentation, and support after a report of intraoperative awareness.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Preoperative evaluation and Appendix 1 summary
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports review of records, interview about previous anesthesia experiences including prior awareness, focused risk assessment, and informing selected higher-risk patients without predicting awareness.

exact_relevant_sections.heading: Postoperative interventions and Appendix 1 summary
exact_relevant_sections.evidence_summary: Supports a structured interview after a reported event, documenting the account, offering counseling or psychological support, and completing an occurrence report without confirming causation.

sources.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.

exact_sections.heading: Review of the available medical record
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.

exact_sections.heading: Patient interview and focused examination
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

exact_sections.heading: Tests, consultations, consent, and documentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-selected tests or consultations, consent for anesthesia care, and recording the assessment in the medical record.
